ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research team conducting the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the protocol used for the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the research team belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the research team was formed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the protocol */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the protocol */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol was approved */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the protocol is due for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tubes" (
  "test_tube_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test tube */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment in which the test tube is used */,
  "volume_Fe3+" TEXT /* Volume of Fe3+ solution in mL */,
  "volume_SCN_" TEXT /* Volume of SCN- solution in mL */,
  "ratio_volumes" REAL /* Ratio of volumes (Fe3+/SCN-) */,
  "absorbance" REAL /* Absorbance value measured */,
  "tube_label" TEXT /* Label for the test tube */,
  "rack_id" TEXT /* Rack ID where the test tube is stored */,
  "shelf_id" TEXT /* Shelf ID where the test tube is stored */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test tube data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test tube data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_tube_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_tubes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absorbance_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absorbance reading */,
  "test_tube_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test tube associated with the reading */,
  "absorbance_value" REAL /* Measured absorbance value */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the absorbance was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure absorbance */,
  "instrument_id" TEXT /* ID of the instrument used to measure absorbance */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absorbance_readings_test_tube_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_tube_id") REFERENCES test_tubes ("test_tube_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical (e.g., Fe3+, SCN-) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the chemical solution in mol/L */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the chemical (solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical */,
  "hazmat_class" TEXT /* Hazmat class of the chemical */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Special storage requirements for the chemical */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the chemical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab technician, admin) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Laboratory location the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_protocols" (
  "safety_protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the safety measures */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the safety protocol was approved */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the safety protocol is due for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "audit_comment" TEXT /* Comment about the audit action */,
  "audit_data" TEXT /* Additional data relevant to the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_audits_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical in inventory */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of chemical available in stock (in mL or g) */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the chemical is stored */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the chemical */,
  "received_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_inventory_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)
